zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Sydenham於大約1139年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希登哈姆時，他的父親Walter de Sydenham29歲，母親Matilda de Boyleston25歲。他和Unkown Fulton至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1228年在他的家鄉享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Sydenham was born about 1139, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Sydenham, was 29 and his mother, Matilda de Boyleston, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Unkown Fulton. He died about 1228, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Sydenham est né environ 1139, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Sydenham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Boyleston, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Unkown Fulton. Il est décédé environ 1228, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

Er hatte mit Unkown Fulton mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1228 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Sydenhamが約1139年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシデンハムで生まれた時，父Walter de Sydenhamは29歳，母Matilda de Boylestonは25歳であった。彼はUnkown Fultonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1228年に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Sydenham(이)가 대략 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Sydenham(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Boyleston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Unkown Fulton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1228년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Sydenham родился около 1139 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Sydenham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Boyleston, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Unkown Fulton. Он умер около 1228 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.
